purpose: Input examples for sharing a VidGo work link to social platforms without connecting social accounts.

local_test_asset.notes: Use docker_compose_url when running the repo with docker-compose. Use vite_dev_url only if running Vite directly. Social platforms cannot fetch localhost URLs, but this is enough to test the VidGo copy/open flow locally.

work_link_contract.work_url: Publicly reachable URL for the generated work media. Prefer result_video_url for video work, otherwise result_image_url.
work_link_contract.generation_id: VidGo user generation id, used only as fallback context inside VidGo.
work_link_contract.caption: User-editable text shown in social composers when the platform supports prefilled text.
work_link_contract.redirect_behavior: Open the platform share/composer/upload destination in a new browser tab. No VidGo social account connection is required.

sample_work.caption: Created with VidGo AI product scene studio.

cases.expected_action: Copy work_url to clipboard so the user can paste it anywhere.

input_example.text: Created with VidGo AI product scene studio.

cases.expected_action: Copy work_url first, then open Instagram because Instagram does not provide a universal web URL prefill for posts.
